name: maungs-agentic-toolbelt
description: A project-agnostic, human-gated multi-agent software-development pipeline for Claude Code: 16 subagents + 11 skills spanning plan → build → review → wrap-up, plus bug diagnosis, code translation, chores, handoffs, scheduled cloud routines, a private per-project to-do backlog, and a self-maintaining codebase wiki. Ships an always-on prompt router that surfaces the right component when a request fits, plus opt-in usage telemetry (/toolbelt metrics).
